• Rate Changed.

• Worksite Mark-Up Not Applicable for Staff. Logic change in Calc Sheet cell K9.
• Premium Holiday Factor secuence changed in Calc Sheet Cell X15. This percentage will be applied on the premium payable under the policy, after all discounts & rebates (except one-time discounts). This percentage will also be applied on rated-up premiums (if any). 
• Premium For Death Benefit Payout secuence changed in Calc Sheet Cell W18. E.g. Out of 100% as death benefit if X% of death benefit taken in lump-sum and Y% of death benefit is taken in instalments and the premium charged is P after all discounts & rebates (excluding one-time discounts). The premium for that policy will calculated as:P*(1-Y%) + (1-10%)*P*Y%

• HSAR Formula changed in Calc sheet cell B18,C18,D18.
For SA >= 1 crore:
Premium = Premium Rate * SA / 1,000 - HSAR * HSAR Multiplier * min(4,50,00,000 ,  SA - 50,00,000) * IF{SA>5,00,00,000 , (SA/5,00,00,000) , 1} / 1,00,000

Formula changed in Calc Sheet Cell AP9 
From:
=IF(AND(Input!D6="Yes",Age<=55),"Pay Till 60",IF(OR(Age>55,AND(Input!D12="Female",(Input!K11-(60-Age))<4)),"",IF(Input!D6="Yes","Pay Till 60","Pay Till 60")))
To:
=IF(AND(Input!D6="Yes",Age<=55),"Pay Till 60",IF(OR(Age>55,Age+I4<60),"",IF(Input!D6="Yes","Pay Till 60","Pay Till 60")))
